spec.description: Air & Comfort — Quiet × Pulse redesign, wired to exact Home Assistant entities.

spec.query:
from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.entity_id == "home_wn1820c_indoor_temperature" and r._field == "value")
  |> group()
  |> last()
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"])

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.entity_id == "living_room_air_purifier_pm2_5" and r._field == "value")
  |> group()
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"])

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "value")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.entity_id == "home_wn1820c_relative_pressure" or r.entity_id == "balcony_wn1820c_absolute_pressure")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _field: if r.entity_id == "home_wn1820c_relative_pressure" then "Home (rel)" else "Balcony (abs)" }))
  |> group(columns: ["_field"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "value")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.entity_id == "home_wn1820c_indoor_temperature" or r.entity_id == "living_room_sensibo_temperature_feels_like" or r.entity_id == "laundry_laundry_sensor_temperature" or r.entity_id == "pantry_pantry_sensor_temperature" or r.entity_id == "balcony_wn1820c_temperature_1")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _field:
      if r.entity_id == "home_wn1820c_indoor_temperature" then "Indoor"
      else if r.entity_id == "living_room_sensibo_temperature_feels_like" then "Living Room"
      else if r.entity_id == "laundry_laundry_sensor_temperature" then "Laundry"
      else if r.entity_id == "pantry_pantry_sensor_temperature" then "Pantry"
      else "Balcony" }))
  |> group(columns: ["_field"])
  |> last()
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "_field"])

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.entity_id == "home_wn1820c_indoor_humidity" and r._field == "value")
  |> group()
  |> last()
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"])

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.entity_id == "living_room_sensibo_airq_co2" and r._field == "value")
  |> group()
  |> last()
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"])

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.entity_id == "living_room_air_purifier_pm2_5" and r._field == "value")
  |> group()
  |> last()
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"])

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.entity_id == "living_room_sensibo_airq_tvoc" and r._field == "value")
  |> group()
  |> last()
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"])

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.entity_id == "home_wn1820c_relative_pressure" and r._field == "value")
  |> group()
  |> last()
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"])

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "value")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.entity_id == "home_wn1820c_indoor_temperature" or r.entity_id == "living_room_sensibo_temperature_feels_like" or r.entity_id == "laundry_laundry_sensor_temperature" or r.entity_id == "pantry_pantry_sensor_temperature" or r.entity_id == "balcony_wn1820c_temperature_1")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _field:
      if r.entity_id == "home_wn1820c_indoor_temperature" then "Indoor"
      else if r.entity_id == "living_room_sensibo_temperature_feels_like" then "Living Room"
      else if r.entity_id == "laundry_laundry_sensor_temperature" then "Laundry"
      else if r.entity_id == "pantry_pantry_sensor_temperature" then "Pantry"
      else "Balcony" }))
  |> group(columns: ["_field"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "value")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.entity_id == "home_wn1820c_indoor_humidity" or r.entity_id == "balcony_wn1820c_humidity_1")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _field: if r.entity_id == "home_wn1820c_indoor_humidity" then "Indoor" else "Balcony" }))
  |> group(columns: ["_field"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.entity_id == "living_room_sensibo_airq_co2" and r._field == "value")
  |> group()
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"])

spec.title: Air & Comfort — Quiet × Pulse
